mapper.select: SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC

SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, E.ename, I.name, V.vender_name FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.shipment_status = #{status}
AND ( upper(V.vender_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' OR upper(S.shipment_id) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND S.shipment_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.shipment_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND S.shipment_date < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY S.shipment_num DESC

SELECT S.shipment_num, S.shipment_id, TO_CHAR(S.shipment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS shipment_date, S.shipment_status, S.plan_qty, S.shipment_request_num, E.ename, E.emp_num, I.name, I.item_num, V.vender_name, SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date FROM shipment S JOIN emp E ON S.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN shipment_request SR ON S.shipment_request_num = SR.shipment_request_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE S.shipment_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT SL.shipment_lot_num, SL.lot_num, SL.qty, L.lot_code, TO_CHAR(L.lot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lot_date, I.name AS item_name FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN lot L ON SL.lot_num = L.lot_num JOIN item I ON L.item_num = I.item_num WHERE SL.shipment_num = #{_parameter} ORDER BY L.lot_date ASC

SELECT L.lot_num, L.current_qty, TO_CHAR(L.lot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lot_date FROM lot L WHERE L.item_num = #{_parameter} AND L.current_qty > 0 AND L.expiry_date >= SYSDATE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN shipment S ON SL.shipment_num = S.shipment_num WHERE SL.lot_num = L.lot_num AND S.shipment_status != '취소' ) ORDER BY L.lot_date ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SHIPMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO shipment (shipment_num, shipment_id, emp_num, shipment_date, shipment_status, plan_qty, shipment_request_num) VALUES (#{shipment_num}, 'SHIP' || LPAD(#{shipment_num}, 4, '0'), #{emp_num}, SYSDATE, '대기', #{plan_qty}, #{shipment_request_num})
INSERT INTO shipment_lot (shipment_lot_num, shipment_num, lot_num, qty) VALUES (SHIPMENT_LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{shipment_num}, #{lot_num}, #{qty})
mapper.select: SELECT SL.lot_num, SL.qty, L.item_num FROM shipment_lot SL JOIN lot L ON SL.lot_num = L.lot_num WHERE SL.shipment_num = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO io (io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, plan_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num) VALUES (io_seq.NEXTVAL, '출고', #{qty}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{lot_num}, NULL, '출하', 3, #{emp_num})
mapper.update: UPDATE shipment SET shipment_status = '완료' WHERE shipment_num = #{_parameter}
UPDATE shipment SET shipment_status = '취소' WHERE shipment_num = #{_parameter}
